title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Various Office Helper Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Office Helper Jobs. Candidates with a 10th Pass and 12th pass can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here we provide more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply offline before the last dat...
